session.user:
Run the following linting commands and report results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them.
1. `uv run ruff check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/abc.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/worktree/real.py src/erk/core/consolidation_utils.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/consolidate_cmd.py tests/core/utils/test_consolidation_utils.py tests/unit/gateway/git/test_detect_rebase_branch.py` 2. `uv run ty check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/abc.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/worktree/real.py src/erk/core/consolidation_utils.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/consolidate_cmd.py`
Report both results clearly.
session.assistant: I'll run both linting commands and report the results.
